primary_sources.notes: Revenue ~₹60,000 Cr. Employee costs ~₹3,200 Cr (5.3%), Advertising & promotion ~₹8,400 Cr (14.0%), Distribution/logistics ~₹6,000 Cr (10.0%).
FMCG segment revenue ~₹25,000 Cr. Advertising ~14-16% of FMCG revenue. Employee segment cost ~8%.
Revenue ~₹13,000 Cr. Employee costs ~₹1,000 Cr (7.7%), Advertising & promotion ~₹1,820 Cr (14%), Distribution ~₹1,170 Cr (9%).
FMCG industry cost structure benchmarks: advertising 12-16% of revenue, distribution 8-12%, employee 5-10%.

source_metadata.methodology: P25/P50/P75 derived from FY24-25 annual reports of 4 listed Indian FMCG companies (HUL, ITC-FMCG, Dabur, Marico). FICCI FMCG survey used for cross-validation. P25 is best-in-class; P90 is structurally high-cost player (premium/niche, lower scale). All categories as % of net revenue.

HR.source_note: Employee cost % of revenue. HUL FY25: 5.3%, Marico FY25: ~8%, Dabur FY25: 7.7%, ITC-FMCG: ~8%. Best-in-class reflects scale leverage and fixed cost absorption.

MARKETING.source_note: Advertising, promotion, trade marketing as % of revenue. HUL FY25: 14.0%, Dabur FY25: 14.0%, Marico FY25: 15.0%, ITC-FMCG: 14-16%. FICCI FMCG Survey 2024: 12-16% industry range.

LOGISTICS_INDIA.source_note: Distribution, freight, C&FA costs. HUL FY25: ~10%, Dabur FY25: ~9%, Marico FY25: ~8%. CII Logistics Report 2024: India FMCG logistics 8-12% of revenue.

IT.source_note: Internal IT including ERP, DMS, trade analytics. Gartner Retail/CPG IT Benchmark 2024: CPG companies 1-2% of revenue on IT.

FACILITIES.source_note: Corporate offices and sales offices (manufacturing facilities excluded). FMCG companies are primarily asset-light in offices. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION.

PROF_SVCS.source_note: Legal, audit, regulatory consulting. SEBI LODR compliance costs for listed FMCG. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION.

PACKAGING.source_note: Primary and secondary packaging material. HUL: packaging included in material costs; typically 9-12% of revenue. Dabur FY25 disclosures.

OUTSOURCED.source_note: Contract manufacturing and third-party processing. Dabur FY25: contract manufacturing disclosed. HUL: ~30% of production outsourced. Smaller FMCG companies: higher outsourcing.

INSURANCE.source_note: Group health, D&O, property insurance (operations). INTERNAL_CALIBRATION.
